description: Composition White shirt made of 100% wrinkle-free cotton, has half sleeves, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, and patch pocket on left chest Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery A classic piece of design, the ever-popular white shirt makes for a sartorial safety net, and can be worn with a blazer and jeans, or formal pants for reliable style. It's wash-and-wear property makes this white formal shirt from belmonte a great addition to your wardrobe. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
